candidate.summary: Grant-only provider export seam for cross-feature ability grants.

reviewRequiredRisks: The seam must not collapse back into hidden attachment authority.
selection_pool and other consumer-local families must not absorb provider seam authority.
Exploratory success or exact grounding must not auto-promote other reusable truth without manual admission.

readinessInvariants: authoritative Lua/KV identity must close to exactly one runtime abilityName
the provider exports exactly one grant_only capability surface
consumer binding stays explicit and local to the consuming feature
bridge may preload the grant runtime but must not auto-attach it to heroes
non-provider features must not leak provider export sidecars

notes: skill_provider_demo and reveal_batch_demo both write on a fresh initialized host.
The fresh proof host still keeps the feature lifecycle exploratory and requiresReview=true.
This host proof is one admission input for the seam, not a reusable admission for provider shell or reveal-only runtime.

sequence: manually remove only canonical module groundingAssessment and feature groundingSummary
validate detects upgradeable legacy grounding state
repair --safe restores canonical module and feature grounding truth
doctor passes after one-shot Panorama build

guardrails: Admission applies to the grant-only provider export seam, not to provider shell as a pattern.
Reveal-only weighted-card remains exploratory and is not admitted as a seam, pattern, or family.
Stale-host recovery remains explicit and one-way; workspace read normalization must not invent grounding truth.
The feature lifecycle for fresh exploratory outputs remains exploratory / requiresReview even when the seam is admitted.
